purpose: Agent-only deep-search seeds for the remaining current binding-workbench tasks that have no packaged source packet yet. This keeps the next CAD pass source-bound and avoids simplified boxes.

seeds.label: Raam Salon

next_agent_tasks: Classify candidate dimension entities into sill/threshold/header/opening-height candidates.
Reject plinth, gutter, pipe and material annotation dimensions as geometry drivers.
Bind only source IDs that match the same facade/detail opening.

special_contract.purpose: Preserves exact CAD plan and left-elevation detail roles for Y02 Raam Salon. It carries safe not-final slots forward but does not cut walls or generate mesh.
rules: The Y02 detail is semantically Linker zijgevel even though the CAD catalog filename is right_elevation.json.
The 0.95 m width is carried only because the exact plan source-pair and CAD width text 95 agree.
The 2.30 m height is carried from the existing CAD dimension text plus dimension-line draft, still not a final wall cut.
The broad 2.85 m component envelope is preserved as rejected context and must not be used as window width.
18, -18, +295, rainwater pipe, brick material and rounded gutter-end notes are context metadata only.
This contract is not a final wall cut, frame, glass or mesh instruction.

recommended_next_cad_queries: Search local elevation vertical dimension lines, sill markers and header/lintel frame linework.
Separate sill/header from plinth, terrain level, rainwater pipe, gutter, screen cassette and Invisivent notes.
Do not infer final wall cut from preview height or component envelope until CAD entities are bound.

special_contract.purpose: Splits Y17 erker into exact CAD leaf/panel candidates from the original elevation frame linework. This is source evidence only and does not identify the operable door leaf yet.
rules: Leaf candidates are derived from original CAD frame source segments only.
The candidate leaf envelopes are indexing evidence and must not be rendered as boxes.
The operable raamdeur leaf is not assigned until exact CAD text/geometry or user validation resolves it.

recommended_next_cad_queries: Use the Y17 erker leaf workbench with the five CAD leaf candidates and original source_entity_ids.
Bind angled side leaves, fixed leaves and the operable raamdeur only from CAD leaf/operation evidence.
Do not simplify the erker into one rectangle or use the rough plan bbox as leaf geometry.

rules: These seeds are not geometry and may not create final wall cuts or component meshes.
Use original CAD source_entity_ids, dimension-line entities and validated detail crops only.
Text labels are preserved as metadata but ignored as geometry unless bound to a local component role.
The next generated review must show source CAD evidence clearly before user validation is requested.
